hero.desc: Frontend Engineer — building real products for real users in logistics, sales systems, and mobile-first apps.

about.title: Frontend engineer
about.bio1: I'm a Frontend Engineer who enjoys building real, practical products — especially in logistics, sales systems, and mobile-first apps. Not just "for demo" — things that actually work for real users.
about.bio2: Right now I'm building mobile apps for drivers (Half Tank, Cosmos Driver) and the Cosmos TMS logistics system at a logistics company. Working in logistics taught me one thing: a single good UI improvement can save an entire team hours of daily work.
about.bio3: Web or mobile — maps, real-time updates, multi-step forms, dashboards — whatever the problem, I solve it with clean architecture and smooth UX.
about.bio4: My goal is simple — build products that solve real problems and feel good to use.

services.title: What I can do
services.subtitle: Core services I offer as a frontend engineer
services.s1_desc: Fast, modern and SEO-optimized web apps built with React and Next.js.
services.s2_desc: Turning Figma designs into pixel-perfect code. Responsive and accessible interfaces.
services.s3_desc: Speeding up existing projects: bundle size, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals.
services.s4_desc: Working with REST API and GraphQL, full backend integration and state management.
services.s5_desc: Building responsive interfaces that look perfect on every device.
services.s6_desc: Reviewing project code, introducing best practices and architecture advice.
